# Permivio

> AI-powered construction permitting, project management, and compliance platform. Permivio helps contractors, developers, architects, engineers, and homeowners navigate permitting from intake through Certificate of Occupancy across 20,000+ U.S. jurisdictions.

Permivio combines an AI Permit Assistant, live jurisdiction lookups, AI Plan Review, Permit Roadmaps, Inspection Mode, and a one-shot Compliance Report generator into a single operating system for construction permitting. AI findings are always classified as Verified Requirement, AI Suggested Issue, or Needs Human Review — never presented as confirmed code violations.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, feature highlights, and how Permivio works.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing for Permivio.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Account sign-in and sign-up for existing customers.
